ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {released: 1976}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {tagline: 'You're gonna need a bigger boat'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial role in *Taxi Driver* (released 1976) compare to his performance in the film *You’re gonna need a bigger boat*, and what critical reception did it receive?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', released: 1976}),       (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie {title: 'You're gonna need a bigger boat'})
WITH m1, m2,        p1 = (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m1),        p2 = (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2)
MATCH (p)-[:REVIEWED]->(m1)-[r1:REVIEWED]->(r1:Movie)<-[:REVIEWED]-(p2:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})
RETURN p1, p2, r1.summary AS TaxiDriverReception, r1.rating AS TaxiDriverRating,        r1.summary AS YoureGonnaNeedABiggerBoatReception, r1.rating AS YoureGonnaNeedABiggerBoatRating
